title: Blueprint Design System – UI Framework by Palantir
content: Blueprint from Directories: Components: Blueprint Design System is a specialized toolkit by Palantir Technologies, optimized for building complex data-dense interfaces for desktop applications. Design System includes a wide component library and documetation. While lacking comprehensive color, font, and accessibility details, Blueprint provides valuable class and variable guidance and guidlines for select elements, tables, and date pickers. Accessibility Color System Repository Icons Tokens Typography Alert banner App bar Autocomplete Breadcrumb Button Button group Cards Checkbox Data table Date picker Dialog Divider Drawer Empty state Form Icon Label Menus Popover Progress bar Progress indicator Radio button Select Slider Snackbar Switch Tabs Tag Text area Text field Tooltip Tree view
